title: Sanji and Zoro Reach Their Limits
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Kaido as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know, I know!! You want him all to yourself, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WAAA- AAAAAH, THIS IS THE END!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Try and grab on to the sky!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: They can't support the Bedrock anymore!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We cannot allow it to reach the flower capital like this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I got big so I could stop it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's no use, MOMONO- Suke- KUN!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I have to try!! We're running out of time!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Look, you can already see the Capital!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll be over their heads in under 5 minutes!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then you have to use your flame clouds!! You're a giant dragon too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's how Kaido's moving the island in the first place!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can hold it back if yours are stronger!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you mad?! I just figured out how to fly, and I'm barely managing that!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
